title: Sending Attachments
drDigitalIntro:
An attachment is a file you add to an email.
• It can be a photo, document, or PDF.
• Click the paperclip icon (📎) to add one.
• Never open attachments from strangers — they can contain viruses.

playgroundTask.goal: You attached a file and sent it

steps.say: Click Compose to start a new email.
Click the 📎 Attach button to add a file.
Type a short message in the body.
Click Send to deliver the email with the attachment.

drDigitalSuccess: You attached a file and sent it! Look for the 📎 button whenever you need to add a photo or document.
drDigitalHint: Click Compose, fill in To and Subject, then click the 📎 Attach button before sending.
